title: Were "Divine" Experiences Actually Just Alien Abductions?

transcript.text: in her book American Cosmic Diana Pula
makes the pretty convincing case that
many seemingly Divine contact
experiences in the past could have
actually been what we now call UFO
experiences just take the case of St
Francis of aisi his close Confidant
brother Leo documents The Experience
describing Sound and Fury creating
atmospheric Sparks a spinning disc
telepathic communication between Francis
and the disc and then Francis is wounded
by rays of light Francis is interprets
these hand wounds as the Stigmata of
Christ but Pula speculates that maybe
this was just radiation damage from a
UFO experience it seems to be like
there's a lot of electromagnetic
radiation that comes off of these crafts
that sounds like visible band light
being blue shifted in the ultraviolet
and you're getting literally a sunburn
